name: Bavarian Apple Torte
recipeInstructions:
- Cream sugar, butter, shortening, and vanilla together.
- Blend in flour and pat into the bottom and 1.5 inches up the sides of a greased 9-inch spring form pan. Place in a preheated oven at 400°F for 15 minutes.
- Pare and slice 5 apples (Winesap and Granny Smith) to make 1 quart (4 cups).
- Filling: Beat cream cheese, sugar, egg, lemon peel, vanilla, and salt until smooth. Pour over the pastry.
- Top with apple slices, cinnamon sugar, and sliced almonds.
- Bake at 400°F for 40 minutes.
